response.justification: Candidate is a strong hands-on full-stack software craftsman with ~14 years of experience, but the role demands a Director-level individual contributor with 15+ years, recognized AI expertise, and a track record of shaping cloud/AI strategy at scale. The resume shows only light, recent exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP generators) and no evidence of leading AI product strategy, advising strategic customers, or building recognized AI platforms. Seniority and AI-specialization gap is too large for a Principal/Director IC AI Strategy role.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Stripe
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, open-source contributions, public talks
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML platform leadership or recognized AI expertise
Career level is Senior/Staff IC, not Director-level Principal with strategic influence
Lacks advanced AI degree and evidence of advising strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption
